title: post api remove background with valid image
description: Test the POST /api/remove-background endpoint by sending a valid image file. Verify that the response status is 200 and the returned content is a PNG image with the background removed.

title: post api remove background with non image file
description: Test the POST /api/remove-background endpoint by sending a non-image file. Verify that the response status is a 4xx error and the error message indicates an upload type validation error.

title: post api replace background with valid image and prompt
description: Test the POST /api/replace-background endpoint by sending a valid image file along with a valid prompt string. Verify that the response status is 200 and the returned content is a PNG image with the new background composited.

title: post api replace background with missing prompt or image
description: Test the POST /api/replace-background endpoint by sending requests missing either the image file or the prompt string. Verify that the response status is a 4xx error and the error message indicates required-field validation feedback.
